title: InitContainer execute multiple times till timeout error if "restartPolicy: Always"
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

When using a Kubernetes YAML file with a Pod definition using initContainers
and "restartPolicy: Always" the init container is executed multiple times till
a timeout error.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. This is the Kubernetes YAML file

```
# test.pod.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: test
  namespace: test
spec:
  restartPolicy: Always
  initContainers:
  - name: init
    image: busybox:stable
    command: [ "/bin/sh", "-c", "echo init $(date)" ]
  containers:
  - name: main
    image: busybox:stable
    command: [ "/bin/sh", "-c", "while true ; do echo main $(date) ; sleep 10 ; done" ]
```

2. Run podman with full debug, after 20 second of running there is the timeout error.

```
# podman play kube --log-level=debug test.pod.yaml
...
DEBU[0005] Created container 8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d in OCI runtime
DEBU[0005] Starting container 8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d with command [/bin/sh -c echo init $(date)] 
DEBU[0005] Started container 8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d

DEBU[0025] Exceeded conmon timeout waiting for container 8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d to exit

DEBU[0025] Removing container 8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d
DEBU[0025] Cleaning up container 8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d
DEBU[0025] Successfully cleaned up container 8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d
DEBU[0025] Unmounted container "8b9041d4c86ee3ffd9d1038c491fa8f0ce5d8d622d74f8d3ce428b130485f79d"
...
```

3. While podman is running, you can see from the logs that the init container
   is executed multiple times even if it terminates with 0 exit code.

```
# podman logs test-init

init Mon Sep 5 11:00:33 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:33 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:33 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:34 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:35 UTC 2022
init Mon Sep 5 11:00:35 UTC 2022
```

**Describe the results you received:**

The init container is executed multiple times even if it terminates with 0 exit code.

**Describe the results you expected:**

The init container should be executed only one time.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.2.0
API Version:  4.2.0
Go Version:   go1.19
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

physical laptop with Debian GNU/Linux bookworm/sid

comments.body: I have this pretty much nailed down.  I need to verify a few details with @mheon before I can cobble up a fix with any confidence.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I don't think @baude ever asked me about this, so I don't really know
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
This has been fixed in the main branch, should be fixed in podman 4.4.
